title: onobrychis alba var. dalmatica
intro: Onobrychis alba var. dalmatica, also known as Dalmatian white clover or Dalmatian melilot, is a perennial legume native to the Balkan Peninsula. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of coumarins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Onobrychis alba var. dalmatica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Dried flowers and leaves of this plant can be used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
